017package org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonschema;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.CollectionUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
022import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.StringUtils.*;
023
024import java.lang.reflect.*;
025import java.net.*;
026import java.util.*;
027
028import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.*;
033import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
034import org.apache.juneau.marshall.swap.*;
035
036/**
037 * Represents a top-level schema object bean in the JSON-Schema core specification.
038 *
039 * <p>
040 * This implementation follows the JSON Schema Draft 2020-12 specification.
041 *
042 * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
043 * <p class='bjava'>
044 *    <jc>// Create a simple schema for a person object</jc>
045 *    JsonSchema <jv>schema</jv> = <jk>new</jk> JsonSchema()
046 *       .setIdUri(<js>"https://example.com/person.schema.json"</js>)
047 *       .setSchemaVersionUri(<js>"https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema"</js>)
048 *       .setTitle(<js>"Person"</js>)
049 *       .setDescription(<js>"A person object"</js>)
050 *       .setType(JsonType.<jsf>OBJECT</jsf>)
051 *       .addProperties(
052 *          <jk>new</jk> JsonSchemaProperty(<js>"firstName"</js>, JsonType.<jsf>STRING</jsf>)
053 *             .setMinLength(1)
054 *             .setMaxLength(50),
055 *          <jk>new</jk> JsonSchemaProperty(<js>"lastName"</js>, JsonType.<jsf>STRING</jsf>)
056 *             .setMinLength(1)
057 *             .setMaxLength(50),
058 *          <jk>new</jk> JsonSchemaProperty(<js>"age"</js>, JsonType.<jsf>INTEGER</jsf>)
059 *             .setMinimum(0)
060 *             .setExclusiveMaximum(150)
061 *       )
062 *       .addRequired(<js>"firstName"</js>, <js>"lastName"</js>);
063 *
064 *    <jc>// Serialize to JSON Schema</jc>
065 *    String <jv>json</jv> = JsonSerializer.<jsf>DEFAULT</jsf>.serialize(<jv>schema</jv>);
066 * </p>
067 *
068 * <p>
069 * Output:
070 * <p class='bjson'>
071 *    {
072 *       <js>"$id"</js>: <js>"https://example.com/person.schema.json"</js>,
073 *       <js>"$schema"</js>: <js>"https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema"</js>,
074 *       <js>"title"</js>: <js>"Person"</js>,
075 *       <js>"description"</js>: <js>"A person object"</js>,
076 *       <js>"type"</js>: <js>"object"</js>,
077 *       <js>"properties"</js>: {
078 *          <js>"firstName"</js>: {
079 *             <js>"type"</js>: <js>"string"</js>,
080 *             <js>"minLength"</js>: 1,
081 *             <js>"maxLength"</js>: 50
082 *          },
083 *          <js>"lastName"</js>: {
084 *             <js>"type"</js>: <js>"string"</js>,
085 *             <js>"minLength"</js>: 1,
086 *             <js>"maxLength"</js>: 50
087 *          },
088 *          <js>"age"</js>: {
089 *             <js>"type"</js>: <js>"integer"</js>,
090 *             <js>"minimum"</js>: 0,
091 *             <js>"exclusiveMaximum"</js>: 150
092 *          }
093 *       },
094 *       <js>"required"</js>: [<js>"firstName"</js>, <js>"lastName"</js>]
095 *    }
096 * </p>
097 *
098 * <h5 class='section'>Key Features:</h5>
099 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
100 *    <li><b>Draft 2020-12 Support:</b> Includes all properties from the latest JSON Schema specification
101 *    <li><b>Backward Compatibility:</b> Deprecated Draft 04 properties (like <c>id</c> and <c>definitions</c>) are still supported
102 *    <li><b>Fluent API:</b> All setter methods return <c>this</c> for method chaining
103 *    <li><b>Type Safety:</b> Uses enums and typed collections for validation
104 *    <li><b>Serialization:</b> Can be serialized to any format supported by Juneau (JSON, XML, HTML, etc.)
105 *    <li><b>Auto Generation:</b> Use {@link JsonSchemaBeanGenerator} to generate schemas from Java types
106 * </ul>
107 *
108 * <h5 class='section'>Common Use Cases:</h5>
109 *
110 * <p><b>1. Simple Type Constraints:</b>
111 * <p class='bjava'>
112 *    <jc>// String with length constraints</jc>
113 *    JsonSchema <jv>schema</jv> = <jk>new</jk> JsonSchema()
114 *       .setType(JsonType.<jsf>STRING</jsf>)
115 *       .setMinLength(5)
116 *       .setMaxLength(100)
117 *       .setPattern(<js>"^[A-Za-z]+$"</js>);
118 * </p>
119 *
120 * <p><b>2. Numeric Ranges:</b>
121 * <p class='bjava'>
122 *    <jc>// Number between 0 and 100 (exclusive)</jc>
123 *    JsonSchema <jv>schema</jv> = <jk>new</jk> JsonSchema()
124 *       .setType(JsonType.<jsf>NUMBER</jsf>)
125 *       .setExclusiveMinimum(0)
126 *       .setExclusiveMaximum(100)
127 *       .setMultipleOf(0.5);
128 * </p>
129 *
130 * <p><b>3. Enumerations:</b>
131 * <p class='bjava'>
132 *    <jc>// Status field with allowed values</jc>
133 *    JsonSchema <jv>schema</jv> = <jk>new</jk> JsonSchema()
134 *       .setType(JsonType.<jsf>STRING</jsf>)
135 *       .addEnum(<js>"pending"</js>, <js>"active"</js>, <js>"completed"</js>);
136 * </p>
137 *
138 * <p><b>4. Arrays:</b>
139 * <p class='bjava'>
140 *    <jc>// Array of strings with constraints</jc>
141 *    JsonSchema <jv>schema</jv> = <jk>new</jk> JsonSchema()
142 *       .setType(JsonType.<jsf>ARRAY</jsf>)
143 *       .setItems(<jk>new</jk> JsonSchema().setType(JsonType.<jsf>STRING</jsf>))
144 *       .setMinItems(1)
145 *       .setMaxItems(10)
146 *       .setUniqueItems(<jk>true</jk>);
147 * </p>
148 *
149 * <p><b>5. Conditional Schemas (Draft 07+):</b>
150 * <p class='bjava'>
151 *    <jc>// Different validation based on country</jc>
152 *    JsonSchema <jv>schema</jv> = <jk>new</jk> JsonSchema()
153 *       .setType(JsonType.<jsf>OBJECT</jsf>)
154 *       .addProperties(
155 *          <jk>new</jk> JsonSchemaProperty(<js>"country"</js>, JsonType.<jsf>STRING</jsf>),
156 *          <jk>new</jk> JsonSchemaProperty(<js>"postalCode"</js>, JsonType.<jsf>STRING</jsf>)
157 *       )
158 *       .setIf(<jk>new</jk> JsonSchema()
159 *          .addProperties(<jk>new</jk> JsonSchemaProperty(<js>"country"</js>).setConst(<js>"USA"</js>))
160 *       )
161 *       .setThen(<jk>new</jk> JsonSchema()
162 *          .addProperties(<jk>new</jk> JsonSchemaProperty(<js>"postalCode"</js>).setPattern(<js>"^[0-9]{5}$"</js>))
163 *       );
164 * </p>
165 *
166 * <p><b>6. Reusable Definitions:</b>
167 * <p class='bjava'>
168 *    <jc>// Schema with reusable components using $defs</jc>
169 *    JsonSchema <jv>schema</jv> = <jk>new</jk> JsonSchema()
170 *       .setType(JsonType.<jsf>OBJECT</jsf>)
171 *       .addDef(<js>"address"</js>, <jk>new</jk> JsonSchema()
172 *          .setType(JsonType.<jsf>OBJECT</jsf>)
173 *          .addProperties(
174 *             <jk>new</jk> JsonSchemaProperty(<js>"street"</js>, JsonType.<jsf>STRING</jsf>),
175 *             <jk>new</jk> JsonSchemaProperty(<js>"city"</js>, JsonType.<jsf>STRING</jsf>)
176 *          )
177 *       )
178 *       .addProperties(
179 *          <jk>new</jk> JsonSchemaProperty(<js>"billingAddress"</js>)
180 *             .setRef(<js>"#/$defs/address"</js>),
181 *          <jk>new</jk> JsonSchemaProperty(<js>"shippingAddress"</js>)
182 *             .setRef(<js>"#/$defs/address"</js>)
183 *       );
184 * </p>
185 *
186 * <h5 class='section'>Migration from Draft 04:</h5>
187 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
188 *    <li>Use {@link #setIdUri(Object)} instead of {@link #setId(Object)} (deprecated)
189 *    <li>Use {@link #setDefs(Map)} instead of {@link #setDefinitions(Map)} (deprecated but still works)
190 *    <li>Use {@link #setExclusiveMaximum(Number)} with a numeric value instead of a boolean flag
191 *    <li>Use {@link #setExclusiveMinimum(Number)} with a numeric value instead of a boolean flag
192 * </ul>
193 *
194 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
195 *    <li class='link'><a href="https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/json-schema-core.html">JSON Schema 2020-12 Core</a>
196 *    <li class='link'><a href="https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/json-schema-validation.html">JSON Schema 2020-12 Validation</a>
197 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JuneauBeanJsonSchema">juneau-bean-jsonschema</a>
198 * </ul>
199 */
200@Marshalled(typeName = "schema")
201@SuppressWarnings({
202   "java:S116" // Field names follow OpenAPI/JSON Schema spec
203})
204public class JsonSchema {
205
206   /**
207    * Used during parsing to convert the <property>additionalItems</property> property to the correct class type.
208    *
209    * <ul class='spaced-list'>
210    *    <li>
211    *       If parsing a JSON-array, converts to a {@link JsonSchemaArray}.
212    *    <li>
213    *       If parsing a JSON-boolean, converts to a {@link Boolean}.
214    * </ul>
215    *
216    * <p>
217    * Serialization method is a no-op.
218    */
219   public static class BooleanOrSchemaArraySwap extends ObjectSwap<Object,Object> {
220
221      @Override /* Overridden from ObjectSwap */
222      public Object swap(MarshallingSession session, Object o) throws SerializeException {
223         return o;
224      }
225
226      @Override /* Overridden from ObjectSwap */
227      public Object unswap(MarshallingSession session, Object o, ClassMeta<?> hint) throws ParseException {
228         var cm = (o instanceof Collection ? session.getClassMeta(JsonSchemaArray.class) : session.getClassMeta(Boolean.class));
229         return session.convertToType(o, cm);
230      }
231   }
232
233   /**
234    * Used during parsing to convert the <property>additionalProperties</property> property to the correct class type.
235    *
236    * <ul class='spaced-list'>
237    *    <li>
238    *       If parsing a JSON-object, converts to a {@link JsonSchema}.
239    *    <li>
240    *       If parsing a JSON-boolean, converts to a {@link Boolean}.
241    * </ul>
242    *
243    * <p>
244    * Serialization method is a no-op.
245    */
246   public static class BooleanOrSchemaSwap extends ObjectSwap<Object,Object> {
247
248      @Override /* Overridden from ObjectSwap */
249      public Object swap(MarshallingSession session, Object o) throws SerializeException {
250         return o;
251      }
252
253      @Override /* Overridden from ObjectSwap */
254      public Object unswap(MarshallingSession session, Object o, ClassMeta<?> hint) throws ParseException {
255         var cm = (o instanceof Boolean ? session.getClassMeta(Boolean.class) : session.getClassMeta(JsonSchema.class));
256         return session.convertToType(o, cm);
257      }
258   }
259
260   /**
261    * Used during parsing to convert the <property>items</property> property to the correct class type.
262    *
263    * <ul class='spaced-list'>
264    *    <li>
265    *       If parsing a JSON-array, converts to a {@link JsonSchemaArray}.
266    *    <li>
267    *       If parsing a JSON-object, converts to a {@link JsonSchema}.
268    * </ul>
269    *
270    * <p>
271    * Serialization method is a no-op.
272    */
273   public static class JsonSchemaOrSchemaArraySwap extends ObjectSwap<Object,Object> {
274
275      @Override /* Overridden from ObjectSwap */
276      public Object swap(MarshallingSession session, Object o) throws SerializeException {
277         return o;
278      }
279
280      @Override /* Overridden from ObjectSwap */
281      public Object unswap(MarshallingSession session, Object o, ClassMeta<?> hint) throws ParseException {
282         var cm = (o instanceof Collection ? session.getClassMeta(JsonSchemaArray.class) : session.getClassMeta(JsonSchema.class));
283         return session.convertToType(o, cm);
284      }
285   }
286
287   /**
288    * Used during parsing to convert the <property>type</property> property to the correct class type.
289    *
290    * <ul class='spaced-list'>
291    *    <li>
292    *       If parsing a JSON-array, converts to a {@link JsonTypeArray}.
293    *    <li>
294    *       If parsing a JSON-object, converts to a {@link JsonType}.
295    * </ul>
296    *
297    * <p>
298    * Serialization method is a no-op.
299    */
300   public static class JsonTypeOrJsonTypeArraySwap extends ObjectSwap<Object,Object> {
301
302      @Override /* Overridden from ObjectSwap */
303      public Object swap(MarshallingSession session, Object o) throws SerializeException {
304         return o;
305      }
306
307      @Override /* Overridden from ObjectSwap */
308      public Object unswap(MarshallingSession session, Object o, ClassMeta<?> hint) throws ParseException {
309         var cm = (o instanceof Collection ? session.getClassMeta(JsonTypeArray.class) : session.getClassMeta(JsonType.class));
310         return session.convertToType(o, cm);
311      }
312   }
313
314   // @formatter:off
315   private String name;                                   // Property name.  Not serialized.
316   private URI idUri;                                     // Draft 2020-12: $id
317   private URI id;                                        // Draft 04: id (deprecated but kept for compatibility)
318   private URI schemaVersion;
319   private String title;
320   private String summary;
321   private String description;
322   private JsonType typeJsonType;                         // JsonType representation of type
323   private JsonTypeArray typeJsonTypeArray;               // JsonTypeArray representation of type
324   private Map<String,JsonSchema> definitions;            // Retained for backward compatibility
325   private Map<String,JsonSchema> defs;                   // Draft 2020-12: $defs
326   private Map<String,JsonSchema> properties;
327   private Map<String,JsonSchema> patternProperties;
328   private Map<String,JsonSchema> dependencies;           // Retained for backward compatibility
329   private Map<String,JsonSchema> dependentSchemas;       // Draft 2019-09+
330   private Map<String,List<String>> dependentRequired;    // Draft 2019-09+
331   private JsonSchema itemsSchema;                        // JsonSchema representation of items
332   private JsonSchemaArray itemsSchemaArray;              // JsonSchemaArray representation of items
333   private JsonSchemaArray prefixItems;                   // Draft 2020-12: replaces tuple validation
334   private Number multipleOf;
335   private Number maximum;
336   private Number exclusiveMaximum;                       // Draft 06+: changed from Boolean to Number
337   private Number minimum;
338   private Number exclusiveMinimum;                       // Draft 06+: changed from Boolean to Number
339   private Integer maxLength;
340   private Integer minLength;
341   private String pattern;
342   private Boolean additionalItemsBoolean;                // Boolean representation of additionalItems
343   private JsonSchemaArray additionalItemsSchemaArray;    // JsonSchemaArray representation of additionalItems
344   private JsonSchema unevaluatedItems;                   // Draft 2019-09+
345   private Integer maxItems;
346   private Integer minItems;
347   private Boolean uniqueItems;
348   private Integer maxProperties;
349   private Integer minProperties;
350   private List<String> required;
351   private Boolean additionalPropertiesBoolean;           // Boolean representation of additionalProperties
352   private JsonSchema additionalPropertiesSchema;         // JsonSchema representation of additionalProperties
353   private JsonSchema unevaluatedProperties;              // Draft 2019-09+
354   private List<Object> enum_;                            // Changed to Object to support any type
355   private Object const_;                                 // Draft 06+
356   private List<Object> examples;                         // Draft 06+
357   private List<JsonSchema> allOf;
358   private List<JsonSchema> anyOf;
359   private List<JsonSchema> oneOf;
360   private JsonSchema not;
361   private JsonSchema if_;                                // Draft 07+
362   private JsonSchema then_;                              // Draft 07+
363   private JsonSchema else_;                              // Draft 07+
364   private Boolean readOnly;                              // Draft 07+
365   private Boolean writeOnly;                             // Draft 07+
366   private String format;                                 // Annotation-level keyword
367   private String comment;                                // Draft 07+, serialized as $comment
368   private Boolean deprecated;                            // Draft 2019-09+
369   private String contentMediaType;                       // Draft 07+
370
371   private String contentEncoding;                        // Draft 07+
372
373   private URI ref;
374
375   private JsonSchemaMap schemaMap;
376
377   private JsonSchema master = this;
378   // @formatter:on
379
380   /**
381    * Default constructor.
382    */
383   public JsonSchema() { /* Empty constructor. */ }
384
385   /**
386    * Generates a {@link JsonSchema} bean from the specified type using {@link JsonSchemaBeanGenerator#DEFAULT}.
387    *
388    * @param type The type to generate a schema for.
389    * @return The generated schema bean.
390    */
391   public static JsonSchema of(Type type) {
392      return JsonSchemaBeanGenerator.DEFAULT.generate(type);
393   }
394
395   /**
396    * Generates a {@link JsonSchema} bean from the specified class using {@link JsonSchemaBeanGenerator#DEFAULT}.
397    *
398    * @param type The class to generate a schema for.
399    * @return The generated schema bean.
400    */
401   public static JsonSchema of(Class<?> type) {
402      return JsonSchemaBeanGenerator.DEFAULT.generate(type);
403   }
404
405   /**
406    * Bean property appender:  <property>additionalItems</property>.
407    *
408    * @param value
409    *    The list of items to append to the <property>additionalItems</property> property on this bean.
410    * @return This object.
411    */
412   public JsonSchema addAdditionalItems(JsonSchema...value) {
413      if (this.additionalItemsSchemaArray == null)
414         this.additionalItemsSchemaArray = new JsonSchemaArray();
415      this.additionalItemsSchemaArray.addAll(value);
416      setMasterOn(value);
417      return this;
418   }
419
420   /**
421    * Bean property appender:  <property>allOf</property>.
422    *
423    * @param value The list of items to append to the <property>allOf</property> property on this bean.
424    * @return This object.
425    */
426   public JsonSchema addAllOf(JsonSchema...value) {
427      setMasterOn(value);
428      this.allOf = addAll(this.allOf, value);
429      return this;
430   }
431
432   /**
433    * Bean property appender:  <property>anyOf</property>.
434    *
435    * @param value The list of items to append to the <property>anyOf</property> property on this bean.
436    * @return This object.
437    */
438   public JsonSchema addAnyOf(JsonSchema...value) {
439      if (this.anyOf == null)
440         this.anyOf = new LinkedList<>();
441      setMasterOn(value);
442      for (var s : value)
443         this.anyOf.add(s);
444      return this;
445   }
446
447   /**
448    * Bean property appender:  <property>$defs</property>.
449    *
450    * @param name The key in the defs map entry.
451    * @param value The value in the defs map entry.
452    * @return This object.
453    */
454   public JsonSchema addDef(String name, JsonSchema value) {
455      if (this.defs == null)
456         this.defs = map();
457      this.defs.put(name, value);
458      setMasterOn(value);
459      return this;
460   }
461
462   /**
463    * Bean property appender:  <property>definitions</property>.
464    *
465    * @param name The key in the definitions map entry.
466    * @param value The value in the definitions map entry.
467    * @return This object.
468    */
469   public JsonSchema addDefinition(String name, JsonSchema value) {
470      if (this.definitions == null)
471         this.definitions = map();
472      this.definitions.put(name, value);
473      setMasterOn(value);
474      return this;
475   }
476
477   /**
478    * Bean property appender:  <property>dependencies</property>.
479    *
480    * @param name The key of the entry in the dependencies map.
481    * @param value The value of the entry in the dependencies map.
482    * @return This object.
483    */
484   public JsonSchema addDependency(String name, JsonSchema value) {
485      if (this.dependencies == null)
486         this.dependencies = map();
487      this.dependencies.put(name, value);
488      setMasterOn(value);
489      return this;
490   }
491
492   /**
493    * Bean property appender:  <property>dependentRequired</property>.
494    *
495    * @param name The key of the entry in the dependentRequired map.
496    * @param value The value of the entry in the dependentRequired map.
497    * @return This object.
498    */
499   public JsonSchema addDependentRequired(String name, List<String> value) {
500      if (this.dependentRequired == null)
501         this.dependentRequired = map();
502      this.dependentRequired.put(name, value);
503      return this;
504   }
505
506   /**
507    * Bean property appender:  <property>dependentSchemas</property>.
508    *
509    * @param name The key of the entry in the dependentSchemas map.
510    * @param value The value of the entry in the dependentSchemas map.
511    * @return This object.
512    */
513   public JsonSchema addDependentSchema(String name, JsonSchema value) {
514      if (this.dependentSchemas == null)
515         this.dependentSchemas = map();
516      this.dependentSchemas.put(name, value);
517      setMasterOn(value);
518      return this;
519   }
520
521   /**
522    * Bean property appender:  <property>enum</property>.
523    *
524    * @param value The list of items to append to the <property>enum</property> property on this bean.
525    * @return This object.
526    */
527   public JsonSchema addEnum(Object...value) {
528      if (this.enum_ == null)
529         this.enum_ = new LinkedList<>();
530      for (var e : value)
531         this.enum_.add(e);
532      return this;
533   }
534
535   /**
536    * Bean property appender:  <property>examples</property>.
537    *
538    * @param value The list of items to append to the <property>examples</property> property on this bean.
539    * @return This object.
540    */
541   public JsonSchema addExamples(Object...value) {
542      if (this.examples == null)
543         this.examples = new LinkedList<>();
544      for (var e : value)
545         this.examples.add(e);
546      return this;
547   }
548
549   /**
550    * Bean property appender:  <property>items</property>.
551    *
552    * @param value The list of items to append to the <property>items</property> property on this bean.
553    * @return This object.
554    */
555   public JsonSchema addItems(JsonSchema...value) {
556      if (this.itemsSchemaArray == null)
557         this.itemsSchemaArray = new JsonSchemaArray();
558      this.itemsSchemaArray.addAll(value);
559      setMasterOn(value);
560      return this;
561   }
562
563   /**
564    * Bean property appender:  <property>oneOf</property>.
565    *
566    * @param value The list of items to append to the <property>oneOf</property> property on this bean.
567    * @return This object.
568    */
569   public JsonSchema addOneOf(JsonSchema...value) {
570      if (this.oneOf == null)
571         this.oneOf = new LinkedList<>();
572      setMasterOn(value);
573      for (var s : value)
574         this.oneOf.add(s);
575      return this;
576   }
577
578   /**
579    * Bean property appender:  <property>patternProperties</property>.
580    *
581    * <p>
582    * Properties must have their <property>name</property> property set to the pattern string when using this method.
583    *
584    * @param value The list of items to append to the <property>patternProperties</property> property on this bean.
585    * @return This object.
586    * @throws BeanRuntimeException If property is found without a set <property>name</property> property.
587    */
588   public JsonSchema addPatternProperties(JsonSchemaProperty...value) {
589      if (this.patternProperties == null)
590         this.patternProperties = map();
591      for (var p : value) {
592         if (p.getName() == null)
593            throw brex(JsonSchema.class, "Invalid property passed to JsonSchema.addProperties().  Property name was null.");
594         setMasterOn(p);
595         this.patternProperties.put(p.getName(), p);
596      }
597      return this;
598   }
599
600   /**
601    * Bean property appender:  <property>prefixItems</property>.
602    *
603    * @param value The list of items to append to the <property>prefixItems</property> property on this bean.
604    * @return This object.
605    */
606   public JsonSchema addPrefixItems(JsonSchema...value) {
607      if (this.prefixItems == null)
608         this.prefixItems = new JsonSchemaArray();
609      this.prefixItems.addAll(value);
610      setMasterOn(value);
611      return this;
612   }
613
614   /**
615    * Bean property appender:  <property>properties</property>.
616    *
617    * <p>
618    * Properties must have their <property>name</property> property set on them when using this method.
619    *
620    * @param value The list of items to append to the <property>properties</property> property on this bean.
621    * @return This object.
622    * @throws BeanRuntimeException If property is found without a set <property>name</property> property.
623    */
624   public JsonSchema addProperties(JsonSchema...value) {
625      if (this.properties == null)
626         this.properties = map();
627      for (var p : value) {
628         if (p.getName() == null)
629            throw brex(JsonSchema.class, "Invalid property passed to JsonSchema.addProperties().  Property name was null.");
630         setMasterOn(p);
631         this.properties.put(p.getName(), p);
632      }
633      return this;
634   }
635
636   /**
637    * Bean property appender:  <property>required</property>.
638    *
639    * @param value The list of items to append to the <property>required</property> property on this bean.
640    * @return This object.
641    */
642   public JsonSchema addRequired(JsonSchemaProperty...value) {
643      if (this.required == null)
644         this.required = new LinkedList<>();
645      for (var p : value)
646         this.required.add(p.getName());
647      return this;
648   }
649
650   /**
651    * Bean property appender:  <property>required</property>.
652    *
653    * @param value The list of items to append to the <property>required</property> property on this bean.
654    * @return This object.
655    */
656   public JsonSchema addRequired(List<String> value) {
657      if (this.required == null)
658         this.required = new LinkedList<>();
659      value.forEach(x -> this.required.add(x));
660      return this;
661   }
662
663   /**
664    * Bean property appender:  <property>required</property>.
665    *
666    * @param value The list of items to append to the <property>required</property> property on this bean.
667    * @return This object.
668    */
669   public JsonSchema addRequired(String...value) {
670      if (this.required == null)
671         this.required = new LinkedList<>();
672      for (var r : value)
673         this.required.add(r);
674      return this;
675   }
676
677   /**
678    * Bean property appender:  <property>type</property>.
679    *
680    * @param value The list of items to append to the <property>type</property> property on this bean.
681    * @return This object.
682    */
683   public JsonSchema addTypes(JsonType...value) {
684      if (this.typeJsonTypeArray == null)
685         this.typeJsonTypeArray = new JsonTypeArray();
686      this.typeJsonTypeArray.addAll(value);
687      return this;
688   }
689

838    * This property is retained for Draft 04 backward compatibility.

840    * @return
841    *    The value of the <property>definitions</property> property on this bean, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.

843   public Map<String,JsonSchema> getDefinitions() {
844      return nn(definitions) ? definitions : defs; // Fall back to $defs for compatibility

849    *
850    * <p>

855    */
856   @BeanProp("$defs")
857   public Map<String,JsonSchema> getDefs() {
858      return defs; // Return only defs, not definitions (to avoid double serialization)

947    * <p>

969      "java:S1133" // Kept for Draft 04 backward compatibility, will be removed in future version

1158   /**
1159    * Returns the property with the specified name.
1160    *
1161    * <p>
1162    * This is equivalent to calling <property>getProperty(name, <jk>false</jk>)</property>.
1163    *
1164    * @param name The property name.
1165    * @return The property with the specified name, or <jk>null</jk> if no property is specified.
1166    */
1167   public JsonSchema getProperty(String name) {
1168      return getProperty(name, false);
1169   }
1170
1171   /**
1172    * Returns the property with the specified name.
1173    *
1174    * <p>
1175    * If <property>resolve</property> is <jk>true</jk>, the property object will automatically be  resolved by calling
1176    * {@link #resolve()}.
1177    * Therefore, <property>getProperty(name, <jk>true</jk>)</property> is equivalent to calling
1178    * <property>getProperty(name).resolve()</property>, except it's safe from a potential
1179    * <property>NullPointerException</property>.
1180    *
1181    * @param name The property name.
1182    * @param resolve If <jk>true</jk>, calls {@link #resolve()} on object before returning.
1183    * @return The property with the specified name, or <jk>null</jk> if no property is specified.
1184    */
1185   public JsonSchema getProperty(String name, boolean resolve) {
1186      if (properties == null)
1187         return null;
1188      var s = properties.get(name);
1189      if (s == null)
1190         return null;
1191      if (resolve)
1192         s = s.resolve();
1193      return s;
1194   }
1195

1240   /**
1241    * Bean property getter:  <property>summary</property>.
1242    *
1243    * <p>
1244    * A short, concise summary of the schema's purpose, intended for AI/LLM consumption, compact
1245    * documentation, or any context where brevity is important. Unlike {@link #getDescription()},
1246    * which can be multi-line and detailed, this value should be a single sentence or phrase.
1247    *
1248    * <p>
1249    * This is a Juneau extension. It serializes as the JSON Schema keyword <c>"summary"</c>.
1250    *
1251    * @return The value of the <property>summary</property> property, or <jk>null</jk> if it is not set.
1252    * @since 10.0.0
1253    */
1254   public String getSummary() { return summary; }

1272      if (nn(typeJsonType))
1273         return typeJsonType;

1338   /**
1339    * Resolve schema if reference.
1340    *
1341    * <p>
1342    * If this schema is a reference to another schema (has its <property>$ref</property> property set), this
1343    * method will retrieve the referenced schema from the schema map registered with this schema.
1344    *
1345    * <p>
1346    * If this schema is not a reference, or no schema map is registered with this schema, this method is a no-op and
1347    * simply returns this object.
1348    *
1349    * @return The referenced schema, or <jk>null</jk>.
1350    */
1351   public JsonSchema resolve() {
1352      if (ref == null || master.schemaMap == null)
1353         return this;
1354      return master.schemaMap.get(ref);
1355   }
1356

1359    *

1363    * @return This object.
1364    * @throws BeanRuntimeException If invalid object type passed in.

1367      this.additionalItemsBoolean = null;
1368      this.additionalItemsSchemaArray = null;
1369      if (nn(value)) {
1370         if (value instanceof Boolean value2)
1371            this.additionalItemsBoolean = value2;
1372         else if (value instanceof JsonSchemaArray value2) {
1373            this.additionalItemsSchemaArray = value2;
1374            setMasterOn(this.additionalItemsSchemaArray);
1375         } else {
1376            throw brex(JsonSchemaProperty.class, "Invalid attribute type ''{0}'' passed in.  Must be one of the following:  Boolean, JsonSchemaArray", cn(value));
1377         }
1378      }
1379      return this;
1380   }

1937      this.prefixItems = value;
1938      setMasterOn(value);
1939      return this;
1940   }

1942   /**
1943    * Bean property setter:  <property>properties</property>.
1944    *
1945    * @param value The new value for the <property>properties</property> property on this bean.
1946    * @return This object.
1947    */
1948   public JsonSchema setProperties(Map<String,JsonSchema> value) {
1949      this.properties = value;
1950      if (nn(value)) {
1951         value.entrySet().forEach(x -> {
1952            var v = x.getValue();
1953            setMasterOn(v);
1954            v.setName(x.getKey());
1955         });
1956      }
1957      return this;
1958   }

2075   /**
2076    * Bean property setter:  <property>type</property>.
2077    *
2078    * @param value
2079    *    The new value for the <property>type</property> property on this bean.
2080    *    This object must be of type {@link JsonType} or {@link JsonTypeArray}.
2081    * @return This object.
2082    * @throws BeanRuntimeException If invalid object type passed in.
2083    */
2084   public JsonSchema setType(Object value) {
2085      this.typeJsonType = null;
2086      this.typeJsonTypeArray = null;
2087      if (nn(value)) {
2088         if (value instanceof JsonType value2)
2089            this.typeJsonType = value2;
2090         else if (value instanceof JsonTypeArray value2)
2091            this.typeJsonTypeArray = value2;
2092         else
2093            throw brex(JsonSchemaProperty.class, "Invalid attribute type ''{0}'' passed in.  Must be one of the following:  SimpleType, SimpleTypeArray", cn(value));
2094      }
2095      return this;
2096   }

2153   @Override /* Overridden from Object */
2154   public String toString() {
2155      return JsonSerializer.DEFAULT.toString(this);
2156   }
2157
2158   private void setMasterOn(Collection<JsonSchema> ss) {
2159      if (nn(ss))
2160         ss.forEach(this::setMasterOn);
2161   }
2162
2163   private void setMasterOn(JsonSchema s) {
2164      if (nn(s))
2165         s.setMaster(this);
2166   }
2167
2168   private void setMasterOn(JsonSchema[] ss) {
2169      assertArgNotNull("ss", ss);
2170      for (var s : ss)
2171         setMasterOn(s);
2172   }
2173
2174   private void setMasterOn(JsonSchemaArray ss) {
2175      if (nn(ss))
2176         ss.forEach(this::setMasterOn);
2177   }
2178
2179   /**
2180    * Sets the master schema for this schema and all child schema objects.
2181    *
2182    * <p>
2183    * All child elements in a schema should point to a single "master" schema in order to locate registered JsonSchemaMap
2184    * objects for resolving external schemas.
2185    *
2186    * @param master The master schema to associate on this and all children.  Can be <jk>null</jk>.
2187    */
2188   @SuppressWarnings({
2189      "java:S3776" // Cognitive complexity acceptable for this logic
2190   })
2191   protected void setMaster(JsonSchema master) {
2192      this.master = master;
2193      if (nn(definitions))
2194         definitions.values().forEach(x -> x.setMaster(master));
2195      if (nn(defs))
2196         defs.values().forEach(x -> x.setMaster(master));
2197      if (nn(properties))
2198         properties.values().forEach(x -> x.setMaster(master));
2199      if (nn(patternProperties))
2200         patternProperties.values().forEach(x -> x.setMaster(master));
2201      if (nn(dependencies))
2202         dependencies.values().forEach(x -> x.setMaster(master));
2203      if (nn(dependentSchemas))
2204         dependentSchemas.values().forEach(x -> x.setMaster(master));
2205      if (nn(itemsSchema))
2206         itemsSchema.setMaster(master);
2207      if (nn(itemsSchemaArray))
2208         itemsSchemaArray.forEach(x -> x.setMaster(master));
2209      if (nn(prefixItems))
2210         prefixItems.forEach(x -> x.setMaster(master));
2211      if (nn(additionalItemsSchemaArray))
2212         additionalItemsSchemaArray.forEach(x -> x.setMaster(master));
2213      if (nn(unevaluatedItems))
2214         unevaluatedItems.setMaster(master);
2215      if (nn(additionalPropertiesSchema))
2216         additionalPropertiesSchema.setMaster(master);
2217      if (nn(unevaluatedProperties))
2218         unevaluatedProperties.setMaster(master);
2219      if (nn(allOf))
2220         allOf.forEach(x -> x.setMaster(master));
2221      if (nn(anyOf))
2222         anyOf.forEach(x -> x.setMaster(master));
2223      if (nn(oneOf))
2224         oneOf.forEach(x -> x.setMaster(master));
2225      if (nn(not))
2226         not.setMaster(master);
2227      if (nn(if_))
2228         if_.setMaster(master);
2229      if (nn(then_))
2230         then_.setMaster(master);
2231      if (nn(else_))
2232         else_.setMaster(master);
2233   }
2234}
